opinion.h: HERRON v. UNITED STATES. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE DISTRICT OF OREGON. No. 791. Decided May 29, 1961.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox, Assistant Attorney General Orrick and Alan S. Rosenthal for the United States.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed.
opinion.h: HOLEKAMP v. HOLEKAMP LUMBER CO., 366 U.S. 715 (1961)
opinion.p: 366 U.S. 715 HOLEKAMP ET AL. v. HOLEKAMP LUMBER CO. ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF MISSOURI. No. 870. Decided May 29, 1961.
Appeal dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
